name: Corvis Rook

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Remove Evidence
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may remove a Scheme or Remains marker within 4" to draw a card.

abilities.name: Serene Countenance
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Backroom Dealings
actions.effects: Look at the top two cards of the target's fate deck and return them in any order.

triggers.name: Fail Safe
triggers.text: Once per activation. Draw two cards of value 3 or less from your discard pile.

triggers.name: Underhanded
triggers.text: Draw a card and then discard a card.

extraction_notes: Resist column shows 'Wp' for Backroom Dealings, but it's a Tactical Action so resist is null per rules
